title: Vextrek's 1.21.1 Prefs
description: New Features, Massive Increase to Visuals and Performance - 120 Mods!
body:
I use this mod list for personal playthroughs, and I thought I'd share with others. This is an overhaul of the Minecraft experience with new features and a massive increase to visuals and performance. For a list of included mods (120 of them!), check out the dependency list in the version info.

---

**Disclaimers**

There are mods in this pack that are not suitable for a public multiplayer experience, so do not use those mods in that environment. What happens to you is not my responsibility, so use discretion for when to play with this modpack.

I do not offer support. Do not ask me for assistance. This modpack is "as is."

All credit goes to the respective mod creators. Thank you all for the amazing work that we get to enjoy! If you want to donate as a thank-you, those mod creators would appreciate it.
